channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: No reflective bollard on road restriction, 15th March
item.description:
The restriction where you give way has no bollard. Just big lump concrete which i nearly went over. Woukd have caused accident. Emergency stop car behind just missed me
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on underpass wall, 15th March
item.description:
There is graffiti in the underpass walkway near Greenland Dock at the Tesco end. Please can this be cleaned off as soon as possible to avoid it being added to by the local ‘artists’. Thanks very much.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redriff Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat in our drive way, 15th March
item.description:
Dead cat in our drive way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned BMW, 15th March
item.description:
Someone had dumped this car and we only have 3 spaces for 18 flats. It doesn't belong to anyone who lives here. It's untaxed and no MOT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 15th March
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-13, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner Douglas Road and Willesden Lane, 15th March
item.description:
Been lying here for almost a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Forest Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 15th March
item.description:
Forest Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-13, Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double yellow line disappeared, 15th March
item.description:
Double yellow line designed for parking restrictions and to reduce congestion are disappearing. Cars have now parking on the spot very often during the day, obstructing the traffic.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): James Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins, 15th March
item.description:
Bin bags left from number 30 Durham Way DA8 2HG

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duriun Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumbed by commuters, 15th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumbed by commuters on the grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned no tax or MOT, 15th March
item.description:
Car appears to have been dumbed for two weeks now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hill Crest, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light shine into house, 15th March
item.description:
54 rusper road we would like the street lamp to have a defector. That is to limit the light coming into the house at 54 rusper road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Rusper Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 15th March
item.description:
More dog poo
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rusper Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes causing obstruction in road and residents bay - please remove urgently, blocking traffic, 15th March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowbank, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.title: Random tall “lamp post”, 15th March
item.description:
A tall post has been installed with an odd box on top. Looks awful. It’s next to street light 56A8
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page Heath Villas, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone dumped a small sofa on the street, 15th March
item.description:
This is quite a recent tip; a small sofa was dumped in front of my garden wall on the pavement and it’s been there a couple of days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wall falling down, 15th March
item.description:
Wall cracked and falling due to heavy rain

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kelby Path, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned road sign and bollard, 15th March
item.description:
Abandoned road sign and bollard which has been disregarded for several weeks blocking footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights
